title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #6, Tama, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GRR PRPRRRRRR RORR ROWR ROWL...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you looking at me so definatly!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: FWISH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GyaAAA a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a aahhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There it is!! The lion's bullseye shot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GRRPOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But they both share the same body!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So his Crotch also belongs to the lion!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Why won't that beast learn... I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Holdem! What should we do with this girl?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Answer this, child...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How did someone like you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Manage to TAME that Baboon all on your own!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GRPR???...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My subordinates saw you do it...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must have the power of an actual devil fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-TAMA!! That power of yours would be very useful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: to the enemy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why you mustn't use your powers in front of others!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm just really good with animals, that's all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...they definitely said that you pulled something off of your cheek.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, why don't we test it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, you! Bring me some pliers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Big bro Loofey....!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Help me, big bro!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: O-TAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: mmmme fee him mmmhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: LuFFY- TARO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You mustn't say things so rash- Ly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nano country- KURI: Bakura Town's main gate...

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Tamaa AaaAAAAAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're We're To...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: BGH!!,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey!! Who are you people?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Stop Right There!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Everybody here is working with the ones...

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Who kidnapped Tama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There isn't any record of them leaving the town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you do some- thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Haki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How are we supposed to find her?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WOOF! WOOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a huge komanu!! Who does it belong to?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't look like any of them will tell us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but I see people here that don't look like fighters as well. Why's that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people living here have been living here their entire lives.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Until around 20 years ago, this was an energetic town that stood at the base of the castle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but then... Orochi's subordinates began to take whatever houses they liked for themselves!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 50 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
